name: Greek Salad Pitas
recipeIngredient: 8 Romaine lettuce leaves, washed and torn into 1-inch pieces
1/2 Seedless cucumber, peeled and cut into 1/4-inch cubes
1 Red bell pepper, cut into 1/4-inch dice
recipeInstructions:
This vibrant salad nestled in pita bread makes an ideal summer luncheon or light dinner.
1. To prepare vinaigrette: Whisk together the garlic, mustard, salt, pepper and lemon juice. Drizzle in oil, whisking constantly.
2. Prepare olive puree: Place ingredients in a food processor; pulse on and off until nearly smooth. Use a spatula to scrape down sides of the bowl.
3. Toss together the lettuce, cucumber, tomatoes, red pepper, scallions, cheese, parsley, mint and vinaigrette.
4. Cut 1 inch off the top of each pita. Open PITAS and spread insides with olive puree. Fill each with salad.
